positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a whimsical astronaut floating among glowing nebula particles and bioluminescent flora. The astronaut suit should have clean, geometric lines and a highly polished metallic texture. The background nebula should explode in vivid yet harmonious hues of deep sapphire blue, magenta, and electric teal. Focus on strong silhouette definition against the radiant cosmic backdrop. The overall style should be a mix of Neo-Art Deco science fiction and ethereal fantasy, rendered with sharp vectors and vibrant, saturated colors. Clean lines, excellent contrast, centered design, suitable for a T-shirt print.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, noise, artifact, muted colors, grayscale, logos, copyrighted, photorealism
